Vendor Map Editor

Use this page to place/edit vendor names on the map.

Map Session

Create, save, restore, and export your current market layout.

View and Navigation
100%

Use ctrl+wheel for zoom, drag background (right-click drag or with spacebar) to pan.

Pin Tools

Lasso select: drag on empty map area. Hold Shift/Ctrl/Cmd to add to selection.

Pin Status and Categories

Apply status/category to selected pins and manage category presets.

Background Setup

Set source image and adjust background scale for pin alignment.

100%
100%

Adjust scale to align the background with your pin layout.

Background Library
Vendor Templates
Vendors: 0 | Active: 0
Template Library
Backup and Archive

Capture named snapshots and restore map versions quickly.

Self Check

Run checks to verify state, libraries, and undo history integrity.

Quick Help
  1. Drag pins to position them on the background map.
  2. Double-click vendor text to edit inline.
  3. Use save/load for localStorage state.
  4. Use checkbox list to activate/deactivate vendors.
  5. Click ↻ on pin to rotate by 45°.
  6. Upload CSV to batch add vendor templates.
Congestion (Experimental)

When enabled, crowded pins can show numeric labels and list full names below.

Congestion Key
    Farmers Market Vendor Map

      Welcome to Vendor Map

      Start by clicking Add Vendor Pin. Drag pins to position them on the map and double-click to edit names.

      • Use Undo / Redo in the sidebar.
      • Zoom with Ctrl + Wheel or the sidebar controls.
      • Press ? anytime to view keyboard shortcuts.

      Keyboard Shortcuts

      • ?: Open this help
      • Ctrl + Z: Undo
      • Ctrl + Y / Ctrl + Shift + Z: Redo
      • Space: Pan tool while held
      • Delete: Remove selected pins
